sprint-driver-core.description: Multi-sprint DAG orchestrator: pre-flight, wave-picker, context-broker, fan-out, state commit, checkpoint

planner-core.description: BMAD-inspired planning chain: setup → research → analyst → PM → architect → task-composer

checkpoint-ux.description: Front-facing checkpoint markdown blocks + TaskList integration

learning-v2.description: Continuous learning v2.1: 100% PreToolUse observation, project-scoped instincts, confidence scoring

self-improvement.description: Sprint retrospective + skill/agent update suggestions as patches

security-guards.description: GateGuard fact-force, governance capture, MCP health check (ECC ilhamı)

linear-integration.description: Linear MCP entegrasyonu — plan-time issue import, runtime status sync, sprint-end summary. Tek ağız: linear-broker. setup/plan/sprint-driver/pipeline skill'leri broker üzerinden konuşur. MCP yoksa noop.

playwright-mcp.description: Playwright MCP canlı UI smoke route'u. test-runner agent'a frontend-touched task'larda live browser interaction ekler. Mevcut e2e/ Playwright suite'i zorunlu kalır; bu MCP advisory smoke için.

telegram-notifier.description: Telegram bot entegrasyonu — bildirim kanalı + interaktif uzak kontrol. notifier-broker: send/send-document/send-with-actions/ask-and-wait/inbox-poll. sprint-narrator: yarı-teknik öğretici sprint/pipeline raporu (md + Telegram). Bot API üzerinden Bot Token + Chat ID; Telegram MCP yok, Node 18+ native fetch + FormData ile bridge. Komutlar: /continue, /stop, /status, /clear, /reply, /start-pipeline. Pipeline akışını bölmez — alert fire-and-forget, rapor Step 9 sonunda.
